---
title: "PatagoniaMet — Hydrometeorological Dataset"
status: completed
start: 2021
---


# PatagoniaMet: A Multi-Source Hydrometeorological Dataset for Western Patagonia

**Status:** Completed (2021–2024)  
**Published in:** *Scientific Data* (2024)

## Summary

PatagoniaMet is a multi-source hydrometeorological dataset covering Western Patagonia (40–56°S). It integrates observational data from multiple sources including weather stations, satellite products, and reanalysis to provide a consistent, quality-controlled dataset for hydrological and climatological research in one of the world's most data-sparse regions.

## Methods

- Multi-source data fusion and quality control
- Gridded precipitation and temperature products
- Streamflow observations from multiple agencies
- Cross-validation against independent observations

## Datasets

- [Zenodo: 10.5281/zenodo.7992760](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7992760) — >3k downloads

## Related Publications

- Aguayo et al. (2024), *Scientific Data* — dataset description
- Multiple studies using PatagoniaMet for hydrological and climate research

## Code

- [GitHub](https://github.com/rodaguayo)
